name: Morning Energy
description: Bright, grounded affirmations to start the day with momentum.

affirmations.text: I welcome this morning with openness and steady energy.
Today I choose one meaningful priority and honor it.
My body is awake, capable, and ready for gentle momentum.
I savor light, breath, and the promise of a new beginning.
I move with purpose without rushing my nervous system.
Opportunities find me when I show up consistently.
I speak to myself with encouragement before I speak to the world.
Small wins this morning build a strong day.
